description_long: This is a single quad roller skate featuring a vibrant blue upper with a textured, honeycomb-like pattern and lime green accents. The skate has a high-top design with a padded collar and tongue, providing ankle support and comfort. Bright lime green laces crisscross up the front, matching the inner lining and the toe stop. The wheels are also blue with green centers, and the black base plate and trucks add contrast to the overall design. The rear of the skate includes a pull loop for easy wearing. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for urban skating environments.
description: A high-top quad roller skate with a blue honeycomb-patterned upper, lime green laces, lining, and toe stop, and blue-green wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue honeycomb-patterned upper, lime green laces, and four blue-green wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lime green laces, padded tongue, and the prominent lime green toe stop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the blue and green color scheme, with the pull loop and padded collar visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded lime green collar, blue pull loop, and the back of the black base plate.
attribute_roller_skates: Quad roller skates with four blue wheels, lime green laces, a blue honeycomb-patterned upper, lime green padded collar, and a lime green toe stop.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing is visible; only the roller skate itself is present, featuring a sporty and modern design with bold color contrasts.
attribute_pose: No figure is present; only a single roller skate is shown.
